description:
The same test helper struct and function are copy-pasted across 11+ test modules:

EnvVarGuard + env_lock() — 6 copies in daemon modules alone:
- daemon_events.rs:187-216, daemon_run.rs:594-629, daemon_scheduler.rs:302-329
- daemon_scheduler_git_ops.rs:29-58, daemon_scheduler_project_tick.rs:195-230, daemon_notifications.rs:1270-1298

Plus 5 more copies in other crates:
- agent-runner/runner/event_persistence.rs:123, agent-runner/sandbox/env_sanitizer.rs:55
- orchestrator-cli/shared/runner.rs:957
- llm-cli-wrapper/mcp_manager.rs:623, tests/e2e_wrapper_matrix.rs:22

Solution: Create a shared #[cfg(test)] test-utils module (in orchestrator-core or a new test-utils crate) with EnvVarGuard and env_lock. Import everywhere.
title: Extract shared test utilities (EnvVarGuard copied 6+ times across crates)
